CustomField.description: Is true if member turns 66 this month or when they switch over to pensionär in their category
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( MembershipStatus__c = 'Aktiv', OR( AND( Age__c = 66, MONTH(DateOfBirth__c) = MONTH(TODAY()), OR( MembershipCategory__c = 'Yrkesverksam', MembershipCategory__c = 'Egenföretagare') ), AND( Age__c = 66, DAY(DateOfBirth__c) = DAY(TODAY()), OR( MembershipCategory__c = 'Yrkesverksam', MembershipCategory__c = 'Egenföretagare')), AND( MembershipStatus__c = 'Aktiv', MembershipCategory__c = 'Pensionär') ) ), TRUE, FALSE )
CustomField.label: Systemfält: Member 66 This Month
